summary: P0 Fixes Testing Complete - All 3 fixes verified: (1) Story card click prefills Studio with title+prompt+animation_style+parent_video_id WITHOUT auto-generation, (2) SafeImage uses IntersectionObserver for lazy loading with 200px rootMargin, (3) FFmpeg _sanitize_transition maps cut/crossfade to valid xfade values (fade)
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js StoryCard handleClick (lines 246-254) correctly passes full prefill object: {title, prompt, animation_style, parent_video_id}
Dashboard.js Hero Watch & Continue button (line 173) correctly passes prefill with current.title, current.hook_text, current.animation_style, current.job_id
Dashboard.js CreateBar (line 421) correctly passes prompt in prefill object
Dashboard.js preloadHeroImage (lines 32-36) replaces preloadImages - only hero image is preloaded
SafeImage.jsx (lines 42-53) implements IntersectionObserver with 200px rootMargin for lazy loading
SafeImage.jsx priority prop (lines 89-91) enables eager loading with fetchPriority='high'
StoryVideoPipeline.js (lines 197-213) reads prefill as object, extracts title/prompt/animation_style/parent_video_id
StoryVideoPipeline.js (lines 214-219) respects freshSession flag - blocks auto-reconnect to active jobs
ffmpeg_assembly.py _sanitize_transition (lines 139-168) maps cut→fade, crossfade→fade, validates against VALID_XFADE set
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 P0 fixes verified working: (1) Story card/hero/create bar navigation prefills Studio with full context and stays in INPUT phase, (2) SafeImage lazy loading with IntersectionObserver, (3) FFmpeg transition sanitization. Dashboard shows 30+ story cards with images, Creator Tools section visible.

story_card_prefill.details: Clicking story card navigates to /app/story-video-studio with title='A Cat's Big City Adventure', story_text prefilled, shows 'Remixing' banner, Generate Video button visible (INPUT phase)

hero_watch_continue_prefill.details: Hero Watch & Continue button prefills title='Clover and the Golden Key', story_text='A brave little rabbit named Clover explored the enchanted meadow...', stays in INPUT phase

create_bar_prefill.details: Create bar input accepts custom prompt, navigates to studio with prompt prefilled

studio_input_phase.details: Studio shows 'Create a Story Video' form with Generate Video button - NOT auto-generating

safe_image_lazy_loading.details: SafeImage uses IntersectionObserver with 200px rootMargin, priority prop for eager loading

dashboard_no_eager_preload.details: Dashboard uses preloadHeroImage instead of preloadImages - only hero image preloaded

ffmpeg_transition_sanitization.details: _sanitize_transition maps cut→fade, crossfade→fade, cross_fade→fade, validates against VALID_XFADE set

story_feed_api.details: /api/engagement/story-feed returns hero and trending stories with job_id, title, hook_text, animation_style for prefill
